activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' from the certificate matches exactly with the invoice issuer 'Volvo Bus Corporation' including VAT number SE556197382601 and country Sweden after normalization. The company name is found explicitly in the invoice header and address blocks, confirming same juridical party. Land Sweden matches exactly. Normalization allowed regarding legal form abbreviations and case differences.

consignee.certificate_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road El-Obour City, Cairo Egypt
consignee.invoice_value: Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E. Wedgnock Lane Km 24 Cairo Ismailia Desert Road CV34 5YA WARWICK El-Obour City, Cairo - Egypt
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Manufacturing Commercial Vehicles (MCV) S.A.E' verified in the invoice in the consignee field with matching address details including Cairo/Egypt and country. Land Egypt matches exactly after normalization. No mismatching information detected. Normalizations applied for legal form and address formatting.

goods_description.motivation: Goods description '12 VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' in certificate matches the invoice item description 'VOLVO BUS CHASSIS B8RLE' with explicit invoice reference and date matching the certificate. Article number per se is not used but explicit invoice reference allows acceptance of general description. Exact matching of key product name after normalization. Invoice contains supporting references to chassis.

quantity.motivation: Quantity in certificate is Gross Weight 72120 kg, which matches the invoice gross weight 72120,00 kg exactly after normalization of decimal and unit. Invoice contains the total gross weight explicitly for the goods. No contradictory weight values found. Tolerances within allowed range.

origin.motivation: Certificate states origin as European Union and Sweden. Invoice explicitly states country of origin as Sweden. Sweden is an EU member state, and the invoice confirms origin as Sweden matching the certificate's European Union claim. No contradictory origins found.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points including consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin match between certificate and invoice without mismatch or uncertainty. The presence of an explicit invoice reference in the certificate supports general goods description verification. No contradictions or missing required information detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Consignor, consignee, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland kan alla verifieras utan anmärkning. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
